title: 某些 App 能不能不要这么自作聪明
content: A user criticizes Amap (Gaode Maps) for overriding native Android screenshot functionality on Xiaomi phones. When the user takes a screenshot intending to use Xiaomi's built-in scrolling screenshot feature, Amap's custom share menu appears and blocks page scrolling. Closing this menu also dismisses the system's screenshot controls. The user notes redundancy—Android manufacturers already provide screenshot sharing—and points out a flawed "Weibo" share button despite the app not being installed, suggesting missing installation detection.

title: 记录一下：给一个 AI 音乐站做 demo BGM 时， prompt 参数比形容词重要得多
content: When generating AI background music, specific musical parameters outperform vague adjectives. Effective prompts follow this order: genre first, then instrumentation, specify vocals or no vocals, set BPM or tempo, and add mood last. For demo videos, "no vocals" is essential to avoid distraction. Generating multiple variations with the same prompt works better than repeatedly rewriting it. Generate full tracks and edit them down rather than requesting exact lengths. Current limitations include lack of stem separation, artificial-sounding vocals, inconsistent style replication, and unclear commercial licensing. AI music suits demos and mood testing but not final professional use.

His son reportedly returned to Hong Kong quietly to arrange funeral affairs.

title: HarmonyOS 用 relationalStore 做本地数据库的完整实战 —— 一个真实项目的 5 个决策
content: This article shares five engineering decisions for using HarmonyOS relationalStore in production: 1) Use an app-level singleton with promise deduplication to prevent race conditions during initialization. 2) Choose the lowest appropriate securityLevel (S1 for most data) to avoid performance overhead and cross-device sync restrictions. 3) Implement idempotent schema migrations using CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS and catching duplicate column errors, rather than version-based migration for simple column additions. 4) Prefer RdbPredicates over raw SQL for type safety, with helper methods for handling nullable columns. 5) Implement upsert as query-then-insert-or-update, with careful handling of default values and using UUIDs for multi-device scenarios.

title: K3发布48小时，服务器满载、英伟达暴跌、Anthropic连夜改订阅
content: Chinese AI startup Kimi released its open-source K3 model, immediately overwhelming servers and forcing a pause on new subscriptions. The 2.8-trillion-parameter model ranks third globally in performance, behind only Claude Fable 5 and GPT-5.6 Sol, at roughly half the cost. K3's "vision in the loop" capability enables autonomous coding iteration with visual feedback. The release triggered an 1111 billion dollar Nvidia selloff and prompted competitor Anthropic to reverse subscription changes. Kimi is now preparing for a Hong Kong IPO at over 30 billion valuation, with ARR tripling to nearly 300 million dollars in three months.

title: Prompt Review 会取代 Code Review？ -- 读《当代码不再稀缺：程序员真正稀缺的是判断力》
content: The article argues that AI-driven development is transforming how engineering teams collaborate. Traditional code review, where senior developers mentor juniors through line-by-line feedback, is giving way to "Prompt Review"—examining how team members define problems, provide context to AI, evaluate AI-generated solutions, and set acceptance criteria. This preserves apprenticeship by making visible the thinking process behind decisions rather than just final code. The author describes their team's internal tool for sharing AI task contexts, conversations, and execution records, which they plan to open-source soon.

title: 亲历 2007 狂热盛夏与 2008 寒彻熊市
content: A veteran investor reflects on China's 2007-2008 market extremes. During the 2007 small-cap frenzy, even ten years' experience couldn't fully insulate him from FOMO. The May 2008 stamp duty hike ("night call") taught him policy risk trumps technical skill during bubbles. The 6124 peak's lopsided rally, driven by heavyweight stocks, showed the danger of chasing unfamiliar trends. In 2008's historic crash, despite 250 days of caution, a few ill-timed bottom-fishing attempts still yielded 36% losses—proving bear markets spare no one. These years forged his core principles: respect cycles, prioritize capital preservation, and accept missing out over forced participation.
source: 热帖 - 雪球 - 八万顷

title: 惊天巨骗，一夜刷爆全球榜单的「神秘实验室」，竟然是假的
content: A mysterious Chinese AI lab called "Basalt Labs" claimed to release Monolith-1.0, a 1.6-trillion-parameter model topping global benchmarks with near-perfect scores. The announcement went viral in the AI community, featuring a polished website, technical paper, and claims of 180 researchers. Within hours, developers exposed the fraud: the Hugging Face repository contained copied Qwen2.5-7B weights with random filler, and the web demo secretly called DeepSeek's API. Creator Max Scherf admitted it was a social experiment to test AI industry gullibility, revealing how easily fabricated metrics and professional packaging could deceive experts without substantive verification.

title: AI-Token 消耗，为啥跟流水一样。。。。。
content:
The user is concerned about rapid AI token consumption, questioning whether it's a misconception or an actual problem. They ask how to address it and whether long context is the cause. The summary must be under 80 words, declarative, and in English.

Potential causes: long context windows, repeated prompts, inefficient API usage, or large system prompts. Solutions: truncate history, summarize earlier context, use shorter prompts, or switch models.

Drafting:
High AI-token usage often stems from lengthy conversation history or large context windows being processed repeatedly. Solutions include trimming older messages, summarizing prior context, shortening prompts, and selecting appropriately sized models. Monitoring token counts per request helps identify specific inefficiencies.

title: DeepSeek V4「满血版」曝光了，最快明天发布
content: DeepSeek V4 is reportedly releasing imminently, with Flash and Pro variants. Early testing shows near-Opus 4.8 performance, strong coding capabilities, and improved agent and 3D/SVG generation. The model introduces surge pricing: V4 Pro costs $0.87–$1.74 per million output tokens, while Flash costs $0.28–$0.56. title: 掌管Codex额度的「赛博义父」，到底什么来头
content: Thibault "Tibo" Sottiaux is an OpenAI executive who has become an internet celebrity for repeatedly resetting Codex usage limits for users. A Belgian prodigy who started coding at age 7, he worked at Google DeepMind for six years before joining OpenAI in 2024. He led Codex's development from an internal tool to a public product, and by 2026 oversaw the unification of ChatGPT, Codex, and developer API into a single super-app. Despite his playful social media persona, Tibo is a serious technologist who personally uses Codex for over 100 daily tasks and advocates for rapid product release and user feedback.

title: Kimi逼得两大巨头改变定价？奥特曼罕见认错，Claude额度重置
content: Chinese AI startup Kimi K3's low-cost launch pressured OpenAI and Anthropic into a user grab. OpenAI CEO Sam Altman admitted past performance was subpar, while his CFO introduced "Useful Intelligence per Dollar" as a new metric emphasizing completed tasks over token pricing. Both companies raced to increase usage limits—OpenAI hitting 9 million active users for its Codex tool in days, Anthropic boosting Claude Code quotas—to capture long-task data from AI agents. The competition centers on which AI becomes embedded in daily workflows, shifting from answering questions to autonomously completing work.

title: 在WAIC 2026暴走三天后，我发现今年最火的AI，都不在电脑里了
content: At WAIC 2026 in Shanghai, AI's center of gravity shifted from cloud models to physical hardware. Two zones dominated: AI phones and robots. StepX Neo demonstrated an agent-native OS executing tasks across apps, while Nubia's Doubao phone advanced toward mass production. Meanwhile, over 200 robotics firms showcased factory-ready machines—picking pharmacy orders, assembling components, and serving coffee—with metrics shifting from dance stability to task success rates and payback periods. The competition has moved from model parameters to embodied deployment: phones and wearables as consumer interfaces, robots as industrial tools.

title: 做了个浏览器里跑真 Manim 的站，也整理了 Windows 本地安装与排错
content: The author created a browser-based Manim playground (jizuobiao.xyz/playground) allowing beginners to run Manim 0.20.1 without installing Python, LaTeX, or VC++ runtime. The environment includes syntax highlighting, autocompletion, frame-by-frame preview, and MP4/GIF export. For local installation, they recommend a staged approach: verify Windows architecture and Python version, use uv for environment isolation, then test rendering in three layers (basic shapes, then text, then MathTex) to isolate issues with core Manim, fonts, or MiKTeX respectively. DLL errors should be fixed with official VC++ Redistributables, not random downloads.

title: 月之暗面Kimi：算力紧缺，即日起暂停C端新用户订阅，将已有算力全部投入于服务已订阅用户 | 原文
content: Moonshot AI's Kimi has suspended new consumer subscriptions due to severe compute shortages. Since launching Kimi K3, user requests have exceeded forecasts and neared infrastructure limits. All existing computing resources will be dedicated to current subscribers to protect their service quality. The company is rapidly expanding compute capacity and will gradually reopen subscriptions as new resources become available.
